title: Hartogia orbicularis

Further categorization places it within the clade core eudicots and the clade angiosperms. This classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and similarities with other plant species.

intro: Hartogia orbicularis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Bioactive constituents of Hartogia orbicularis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal activities.
